name: Phenix RTS
description: Phenix RTS — synchronous sub-second live streaming CDN

seo.title: Phenix RTS — Object Storage / Media API
seo.meta_description: Phenix RTS: Phenix RTS — synchronous sub-second live streaming CDN

when_to_use: Synchronous sub-second streaming for interactive live sports
Real-time betting and second-screen apps with near-zero latency
Replacing HLS with RTS for interactive live auction platforms
Sub-100ms live stream delivery to 1M+ concurrent viewers
Interactive live video where viewers act on synchronized events

pros: SDKs for web, iOS, Android, Unity
review.verdict: Premium sub-second CDN for when stream sync drives revenue — otherwise Millicast or Mux do fine.
review.best_for: Sports betting, auctions, iGaming needing identical-time streams to every viewer.
review.not_for: VOD, general OTT, or latency-tolerant streaming.

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: No explicit peak-lock evidence; default FALSE per rules.
